specific_concerns: The Sanskrit-quoting skip-level may read theatrically to a serious practitioner — but the layer uses the verse as a structural marker, not a fashion accessory.
The 'three sprints of orbit on a one-week task' framing is a very specific, lived engineering scene that prevents the verse from sliding into slogan-mode.
verdict_reason: The verse honors the source. The diagnosis preserves the kṣudra (petty) magnitude marker — small thing wearing the costume of a large thing — which is doctrinally load-bearing. The imperative uttiṣṭha is preserved. The verse does not become 'just ship more!' productivity advice; it preserves the specific failure mode (disproportion between concern and reality) and the corrective (commit and bring back specific blockers). A serious practitioner would find this verse used carefully and not flippantly. The Krishna-Arjuna senior-to-senior register is preserved by the counter_example.
